Package connector.common

Class JsonUtil.JsonParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • connector.common.JsonUtil.JsonParser
  • Enclosing class:
    JsonUtil
    public static class JsonUtil.JsonParser
extends java.lang.Object

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      JsonParser()  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean containsKey​(java.lang.String source, java.lang.String key)
      Returns boolean value if the provided key is present in the supplied JSON source
      java.lang.Object get​(java.lang.String source, java.lang.String key)
      Returns the value of the JSON attribute indicated by key from the JSON source string.
      java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Object> get​(java.lang.String source, java.util.Collection<java.lang.String> keys)
      Returns a Map containing JSON paths indicated by keys as the key and its value, if present, from the JSON source string.
      java.lang.Boolean getAsBoolean​(java.lang.String source, java.lang.String key)
      Returns boolean value from the supplied JSON source associated with the provided key
      java.util.List<java.lang.Object> getAsList​(java.lang.String source, java.lang.String key)
      Returns List from the supplied JSON source associated with the provided key
      java.lang.Number getAsNumber​(java.lang.String source, java.lang.String key)
      Returns Number from the supplied JSON source associated with the provided key
      java.lang.String getAsString​(java.lang.String source, java.lang.String key)
      Returns the value of the JSON attribute indicated by key in the JSON source string as String.
      boolean isEmpty​(java.lang.String source, java.lang.String key)
      Returns boolean value for determining the value of the associated object with the provided key in the supplied JSON string is empty or not.
      int length​(java.lang.String source)
      Returns the count of element in the supplied JSON string
      java.lang.Object parseJson​(java.lang.String source)
      Returns Java-equivalent object for the supplied JSON source.
      java.lang.Object parseJson​(java.lang.String source, java.lang.Class<?> targetClass)
      Returns object of type targetClass for the supplied JSON source.
      java.lang.String put​(java.lang.String target, java.lang.String key, java.lang.Object value)
      Associating the specified value with the specified key in the provided JSON target.If the the provided target previously contained a mapping for the key, the oldvalue is replaced.
      java.lang.String remove​(java.lang.String target, java.lang.String key)
      Removes the mapping for the specified key from the provided JSON string target, if present.
      java.lang.String toJson​(java.lang.Object source)
      Converts the JSON source to JSON string and includes null values in the returned JSON string if includeNulls is true.
      java.util.List<java.lang.Object> toList​(java.lang.String jsonArraySource)
      Creates a List from the supplied JSON jsonArraySource.
      java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Object> toMap​(java.lang.String source)
      Creates a Map from the supplied JSON source.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • JsonParser

        public JsonParser()

    • Method Detail

      • toJson

        public java.lang.String toJson​(java.lang.Object source)
        Converts the JSON source to JSON string and includes null values in the returned JSON string if includeNulls is true.
        Parameters:
        source - Object to convert to JSON form
        Returns:
        JSON String representation of supplied source object

      • parseJson

        public java.lang.Object parseJson​(java.lang.String source)
        Returns Java-equivalent object for the supplied JSON source.

        Below is the JSON source to Java-equivalent mapping:

        JSON Source Returns
        Json Array: [...] List<Object>
        JSON Map: {...} Map<String, Object>
        String, Number, Boolean, primitives Corresponding Java equivalent class
        Parameters:
        source - JSON string for conversion
        Returns:
        Java equivalent Object post JSON conversion

      • parseJson

        public java.lang.Object parseJson​(java.lang.String source,
                                  java.lang.Class<?> targetClass)
        Returns object of type targetClass for the supplied JSON source.

        If targetClass is null, parseJson(String) will be the default invocation.

        Parameters:
        source - JSON string for conversion
        targetClass - name of the class to which the JSON source should be converted to
        Returns:
        object to type targetClass, if not null, Java equivalent Object otherwise

      • toMap

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Object> toMap​(java.lang.String source)
        Creates a Map from the supplied JSON source.
        Parameters:
        source - JSON string for conversion
        Returns:
        a Map containing JSON key-value pairs

      • toList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.Object> toList​(java.lang.String jsonArraySource)
        Creates a List from the supplied JSON jsonArraySource.
        Parameters:
        jsonArraySource - JSON string for conversion
        Returns:
        a List contains the array elements

      • get

        public java.lang.Object get​(java.lang.String source,
                            java.lang.String key)
        Returns the value of the JSON attribute indicated by key from the JSON source string.
        Parameters:
        source - JSON source string
        key - key to extract the associated value
        Returns:
        Object associated with the key in the supplied JSON string

      • get

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Object> get​(java.lang.String source,
                                                                  java.util.Collection<java.lang.String> keys)
        Returns a Map containing JSON paths indicated by keys as the key and its value, if present, from the JSON source string.
        Parameters:
        source - JSON source string
        keys - keys to extract the associated value
        Returns:
        Object associated with the key in the supplied JSON string

      • getAsString

        public java.lang.String getAsString​(java.lang.String source,
                                    java.lang.String key)
        Returns the value of the JSON attribute indicated by key in the JSON source string as String.
        Parameters:
        source - JSON source string
        key - key to extract the associated value string
        Returns:
        associated value with the key

      • getAsNumber

        public java.lang.Number getAsNumber​(java.lang.String source,
                                    java.lang.String key)
        Returns Number from the supplied JSON source associated with the provided key
        Parameters:
        source - JSON source string
        key - key to extract the associated Number
        Returns:
        associated Number with the provided key

      • getAsList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.Object> getAsList​(java.lang.String source,
                                                  java.lang.String key)
        Returns List from the supplied JSON source associated with the provided key
        Parameters:
        source - JSON source string
        key - key to extract the associated value
        Returns:
        associated JSONArray with the provided key as List

      • getAsBoolean

        public java.lang.Boolean getAsBoolean​(java.lang.String source,
                                      java.lang.String key)
        Returns boolean value from the supplied JSON source associated with the provided key
        Parameters:
        source - JSON source string
        key - key to extract the associated value
        Returns:
        associated boolean value with the providedkey

      • containsKey

        public boolean containsKey​(java.lang.String source,
                           java.lang.String key)
        Returns boolean value if the provided key is present in the supplied JSON source
        Parameters:
        source - JSON source string
        key - key to identify the presence
        Returns:
        true if the key is present in the supplied JSON string , else false

      • isEmpty

        public boolean isEmpty​(java.lang.String source,
                       java.lang.String key)
        Returns boolean value for determining the value of the associated object with the provided key in the supplied JSON string is empty or not.
        Parameters:
        source - JSON source string
        key - key to identify associating value
        Returns:
        true if the value of the associated object with the key in the supplied JSON string is empty or not present , else false.

      • length

        public int length​(java.lang.String source)
        Returns the count of element in the supplied JSON string
        Parameters:
        source - JSON source string
        Returns:
        count of the elements in the supplied JSON string

      • remove

        public java.lang.String remove​(java.lang.String target,
                               java.lang.String key)
        Removes the mapping for the specified key from the provided JSON string target, if present.
        Parameters:
        target - JSON target string
        key - key to be remove from targeted JSON
        Returns:
        JSON String of updated target JSON string

      • put

        public java.lang.String put​(java.lang.String target,
                            java.lang.String key,
                            java.lang.Object value)
        Associating the specified value with the specified key in the provided JSON target.If the the provided target previously contained a mapping for the key, the oldvalue is replaced.
        Parameters:
        target - JSON target string
        key - key to be added in target JSON string
        value - value to be added in targeted JSON target
        Returns:
        JSON String with newly added/updated key value pairs
